title: Python for Data Scientists: A Practical Guide
description: A hands-on guide to Python programming for data scientists, covering core Python, data manipulation, visualization, and machine learning fundamentals.
writing_guidelines: Use concrete, real-world data science examples
Define statistical and technical terms clearly
End each chapter with key takeaways and exercises

chapters.title: Python Foundations for Data Science
chapters.description: Core Python concepts every data scientist must know: data types, control flow, functions, list comprehensions, and the scientific Python ecosystem overview.

chapters.title: Data Manipulation with Pandas
chapters.description: Loading, cleaning, filtering, grouping, and transforming data using pandas DataFrames. Handling missing values, merging datasets, and time series basics.

chapters.title: Data Visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn
chapters.description: Creating effective visualizations: line charts, histograms, scatter plots, heatmaps, and distribution plots. Choosing the right chart for your data story.
